sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_arrays (id UInt32, values Array(Int32));
INSERT INTO test_arrays VALUES (1, array(1, 2, NULL, 4)), (2, array(3, 5, 6));
SELECT id, array(sum(values)) AS total_values FROM test_arrays GROUP BY id HAVING total_values > 0;
SELECT id FROM (SELECT id, array(length(values)) AS value_count FROM test_arrays GROUP BY id) AS counts WHERE counts.value_count > 2;
CREATE TABLE test_join AS SELECT a.id, array(a.value) AS value_array FROM (SELECT id, array(1, NULL, 7) AS value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM test_arrays)) AS a WHERE a.value > 5;
SELECT id FROM test_arrays WHERE arrayExists(x -> x > 3, values);
SELECT id, arrayJoin(array(1, 2, NULL, 4)) AS expanded_value FROM test_arrays WHERE expanded_value > 2;
SELECT id, array(sum(values)) AS aggregate FROM test_arrays GROUP BY id HAVING aggregate > array(3, 2)[1];
SELECT id FROM (SELECT id, array(1, 2, 3) AS arr FROM test_arrays) AS sub WHERE sub.arr[1] > 2;
